reasoning: Multiple sources from late 2025 and early 2026 confirm that NATO's Article 5 has still only ever been invoked once in history: following the September 11, 2001 terrorist attacks. A Washington Post opinion piece dated January 26, 2026, explicitly states "the only time that NATO Article 5 was ever invoked was on behalf of the United States after the Sept. 11". If Article 5 had been invoked in 2025, it would have been a massive global event dominating headlines, and more recent sources would reference it. The absence of any such news and the explicit confirmation in 2026 that it has only been invoked once clearly indicates this did not happen.
